data.content:
Everything works. Here's what was created in `ProductsApi/`:

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/Product.cs` | `Product`, `CreateProductRequest`, and `Category` enum (Electronics, Clothing, Food, Books) |
| `Services/IProductService.cs` | Interface with `GetAll`, `GetById`, `Create` |
| `Services/InMemoryProductService.cs` | Thread-safe in-memory implementation |
| `Program.cs` | Minimal API with 3 endpoints + OpenAPI metadata |

**Endpoints verified:**
- `GET /api/products` → `200 []`
- `POST /api/products` → `201` with assigned ID & timestamp
- `GET /api/products/{id}` → `200` or `404`
- `GET /openapi/v1.json` → full OpenAPI doc with summaries & descriptions
